notes: SHIP v1.14.302 - Black-Glass Surfaces + new Ghost asset (web-Claude design drop, owner 'yes ship black-glass as .302'). RECONCILED a build-line COLLISION: web-Claude's zip was ALSO stamped .301 but built on the .300 base (had Stage 0/1 rail compass + N-09, but NOT the live .301 N-06 Stage 2 3D emitters). Rather than drop in their 4 files (which would REVERT the device-verified Stage 2), the black-glass deltas were extracted by diffing their build against the .300 commit (b0b9afd) - a provably-clean diff of exactly 13 CSS lines + the version const, no other divergence - and RE-APPLIED on top of live .301, restamped .302. Change (redesign-scoped, ?legacy=1 byte-identical, NO JS logic touched): (1) app-wide surface fill navy #0a0d13->#070809 retuned to a darker 3-stop black glass linear-gradient(160deg,#0a0c10,#040506 62%,#070a0d) - 10 fills across .rf-card, body.rd .gx/.gx-bg/.rl-row/.rl-search-input, #ref-grid/#work-grid/.deploy-tools-grid .rf-card (the #0b0e15 variant), #pg-cmd .lens/.stat/.nba/.tile; (2) top rim-light 'inset 0 1px 0 rgba(205,235,245,.09),' prefixed onto 9 surface box-shadows (.rf-card + :active, .gx/.gx-green/.gx-gold/.gx-bg, .lens/.stat/.nba). UNTOUCHED: every accent border (cyan lens / violet NBA / --rfac / --tc), the --glow-* one-knob system, all doctrine logic. (3) New ghost asset cc-ghost.webp swapped in-place (same filename): new transparent code-eye cutout, VP8X 560x667 aspect 0.840 (== old, so the existing #pg-cmd .ghosthero rule needs no change), ~73KB. Gates: whole-file braces 11781/11781 UNCHANGED (CSS value edits only, no brace delta), Stage 2 markers intact (18 _rail3dSelGrp occ - NOT reverted), CRLF preserved, three-stamp .301->.302; sw.js precache already lists cc-ghost.webp so the CACHE_VERSION bump re-fetches it. DEVICE-VERIFY (John - hard gate): (1) surfaces read as smoked black glass across Command/Work/Crash Cart - one material, accent borders intact, HANDOFF still amber/gold, NO navy cast; (2) ghost is the new code-eye cutout, pitch black behind it, no rectangle/halo; (3) N-06 Stage 2 3D rail compass STILL works (tap a unit in the reh3d Inspection Bay -> cyan band + cage dots) - confirm the reconcile preserved it; (4) ?legacy=1 unchanged. OPEN (John's on-device call, deferred): ghost sits in the EXISTING ghosthero rule (ambient right:18px bottom:100px width:104px z-index:-1 behind hero); web-Claude's locked mockup showed a larger FOREGROUND ghost (~right:22px bottom:140px width:118px, no z-index:-1, no drop-shadow) - tune ghosthero on-device if the foreground look is wanted, but keep it off SET SHIFT END / hverbs / magstrip and NEVER add a drop-shadow (boxes it on OLED black). NEXT: N-10 Crash-Cart search-first (parked on owner's two-search-bar call).
